title: A Smelly Ice Cream Ad Tempts Few London Commuters
summary_full: Magnum Ice Cream is scaling back a scented ad at King’s Cross station after commuters complained that the aroma was “sickly” and “artificial.”
summary_public: Magnum Ice Cream is scaling back a scented ad at King’s Cross station after commuters complained that the aroma was “sickly” and “artificial.”

GB.label: neutral
